title: AlgoVault Skills Manifest
description: Single source of truth for the 20 Skills shipped in the algovault-skills plugin. Generator (scripts/gen-skill.mjs) emits one skills/<slug>/SKILL.md per entry.

slug.description: Kebab-case identifier; becomes directory name and UTM campaign value.

name.description: Human-readable Skill title (verbatim from docs.html h3).

description.description: One-sentence summary (verbatim from docs.html card paragraph). The generator appends tool sequence + difficulty.

tools.description: MCP tool names invoked by this Skill, in call order.

prompt.description: Verbatim example prompt from the docs card.

pattern.description: The 'Pattern:' annotation from the docs card footer (e.g. 'conditional chaining', 'multi-agent orchestration').
